name: F&B Content Engine
description: Social media operations plugin for F&B brands — 7 platforms, bilingual, compliance gates, automated reporting, self-configuring onboarding.

brand_name.description: Official brand name, exact casing (e.g. 12eat唐人街外卖)

brand_slug.description: Lowercase alphanumeric slug for file paths (e.g. 12eat)

active_platforms.description: Platforms with confirmed credentials — agent auto-publishes

pending_platforms.description: Platforms brand wants but credentials not yet connected

trending_radar_url.description: Shared Trending Radar Lark Doc URL

lark_workspaces_url.description: AI Workspaces folder URL for vault creation
